name: Fat-Free Banana Muffins (c) (Lacto)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F (200°C).
2. Spray 12 (2½-inch) muffin cups with cooking spray.
3. In a medium bowl, combine flour, sugar, baking powder, salt, and cinnamon.
4. In a large bowl, beat egg whites lightly with a fork or wire whisk.
5. Stir in mashed bananas, milk, and honey until well blended.
6. Add the flour mixture; stir until just combined.
7. Spoon batter into prepared muffin cups.
8. Bake for 20 to 25 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean.
9. Cool in the pan for 5 minutes before removing and cooling on a wire rack.
Fat-Free Banana Quick Bread:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. Spray an 8 x 4 x 2½-inch loaf pan with cooking spray.
3. Prepare the batter as directed above.
4. Pour batter into prepared pan.
5. Bake for 50 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean.
6. Cool in the pan for 10 minutes before removing and serving warm or on a wire rack. Makes 12 servings. (Nutrition information is per serving.)
